title: 🚀 ChartScopeAI – AI Chart Analysis & Trading Insights (Free Trial!) 📊
author: Careless-Equal6722
selftext:
Hey traders and chart lovers! 👋

I wanted to share a tool I’ve been working on that’s perfect for anyone who wants smarter, faster chart analysis without the headache. It’s called ChartScopeAI Pro — an AI-powered chart analyzer that helps you understand candlestick charts, spot key levels, and get actionable insights instantly.

💡 What ChartScopeAI Does

* 📈 Upload chart screenshots for instant AI analysis
* 🤖 Identifies ideal entry points, stop loss & profit targets
* 🧠 Highlights support/resistance, trend shifts, and patterns
* 📊 Breaks down candlestick behavior in simple language
* 🛠️ Works with stocks, crypto, forex, and indices

🔎 Why This Matters

If you’ve ever spent ages staring at a chart wondering “Is this a reversal, breakout, or trap?” — ChartScopeAI gives you clarity in seconds. It’s like having an experienced market analyst right beside you.

📍 Try It Free

Anyone can upload charts and try a free trial — no commitment:

👉 [https://chartscopeai.org](https://chartscopeai.org)

💬 Would love to hear feedback from chart traders here! What indicators do you use most often? And how would AI help your workflow?

comments.author: nekich0987
comments.body: what ai do you use to analyse?

replies.author: Careless-Equal6722
replies.body: ChartScopeAI Pro uses a combination of computer vision and large language AI models that are fine-tuned for financial chart interpretation. The AI analyzes candlestick patterns, support/resistance zones, and market structure to generate educational insights and trade ideas.
